Events.PreEventString: You see a suspicious looking flower.
Events.PostEventString: Surprise! It's a Floette. It gives you $1 as a gift.

Events.PreEventString: You accidentally bump against a $1. It drops it's ice cream, and now it's extremely angry.
Events.PostEventString: The Pokemon goes away, leaving $1 behind.

Events.PreEventString: Floating around, you see an Evolution Crystal. YE WHO SEEK AWAKENING, LET US BEGIN.
You find some delicious candy in the floor... Maybe you shouldn't...
Events.PostEventString: Your Pokemon eat it anyway, they recover some health.

Events.PreEventString: You see a suspicious looking flower.
Events.PostEventString: Surprise! It's a Floette. It uses Aromatherapy and heals all your Pokemon's status.

Events.PreEventString: All your Pokemon are singing and having fun, especially $1.
Events.PostEventString: Wait... Was $1 always in the team?

Events.PreEventString: You find some delicious candy in the floor... Maybe you shouldn't...
Events.PostEventString: Your Pokemon eat it anyway, but they get tummy ache.

Events.PreEventString: You see a suspicious looking flower.
Events.PostEventString: Surprise! It's a Floette. It uses Toxic and floats away.

Events.PreEventString: $1 is pissed off, the Clefairy int he island stole all their stuff. They're in such a bad mood that they fight you.
Events.PostEventString: $1 calms down, and decides to take a break you continue on your way.

Events.PreEventString: You find an abandoned spaceship crashed on the floor. You probably don't want to ask many questions.
Events.PostEventString: However, inside the ship you find a $1.

Events.PreEventString: In the center of a clearing, you find a huge apricorn tree. You have no idea why there's an apricorn tree here. You shake it, but an angry $1 falls down and attacks!
Events.PostEventString: The annoyed Pokemon walks away. You pick up all the apricorns that fell down ($1)

RoomShortcuts.Clue: Upon entrance to the island, a number of Fairy Pokemon demand their toll (you need to play with them).
RoomShortcuts.Resolution: The Fairies play with $1 eye the whole afternoon. Then they give you safe passage through the island.

RoomShortcuts.Clue: There's a magic bridge ahead. It could be activated but the instructions are in a weird language: ⠗⠑⠛⠊ ⠏⠥⠵⠵⠇⠑
RoomShortcuts.Resolution: Your $1 shines and... You know what this doesn't make any sense.

DungeonShortcut.Clue: You're on the top of whimsy island. What adventures lie ahead?

WildMonsEvent.PostEventString: You won the battle and obtained multiple items that the wild Pokemon were holding ($1).

BossEvent.PreEventString: In the center of the island, you find an overwhelming energy. The rocks start floating as a great ancient force is awoken...
BossEvent.PostEventString: As you defeat the titan, the ground rumbles. Your actions here have are changing the world.

CampingEvent.PreEventString: You find an area safe from the mischievous Fairy Pokemon.
CampingEvent.PostEventString: But now it's time to move on...

PostBossEvent.PreEventString: One day they will awaken once more.
PostBossEvent.PostEventString: The Earth will shake, in two, will break ...
